'''nohafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:biarticulate|biarticulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:biarticulate|biarticulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nohafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nohafithi|nohafithi]] || [[word:nohafiji|nohafiji]] || [[word:nohafishi|nohafishi]] || [[word:nohafiki|nohafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nohafuthuthu|nohafuthuthu]] || [[word:nohafujuju|nohafujuju]] || [[word:nohafushushu|nohafushushu]] || [[word:nohafukuku|nohafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nohafuthu|nohafuthu]] || [[word:nohafuju|nohafuju]] || [[word:nohafushu|nohafushu]] || [[word:nohafuku|nohafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nohafufthuf|nohafufthuf]] || [[word:nohafufjuf|nohafufjuf]] || [[word:nohafufshuf|nohafufshuf]] || [[word:nohafufkuf|nohafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nohafethe|nohafethe]] || [[word:nohafeje|nohafeje]] || [[word:nohafeshe|nohafeshe]] || [[word:nohafeke|nohafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nohafothotho|nohafothotho]] || [[word:nohafojojo|nohafojojo]] || [[word:nohafoshosho|nohafoshosho]] || [[word:nohafokoko|nohafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nohafotho|nohafotho]] || [[word:nohafojo|nohafojo]] || [[word:nohafosho|nohafosho]] || [[word:nohafoko|nohafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nohafofthof|nohafofthof]] || [[word:nohafofjof|nohafofjof]] || [[word:nohafofshof|nohafofshof]] || [[word:nohafofkof|nohafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfthÃŸf|nohafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfjÃŸf|nohafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfshÃŸf|nohafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfkÃŸf|nohafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nohafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nohafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nohafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nohafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfthÃŸf|nohafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfjÃŸf|nohafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfshÃŸf|nohafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfkÃŸf|nohafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfthÃŸf|nohafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfjÃŸf|nohafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfshÃŸf|nohafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nohafÃŸfkÃŸf|nohafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nohafÃḊthÃḊ|nohafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nohafÃḊjÃḊ|nohafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nohafÃḊshÃḊ|nohafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nohafÃḊkÃḊ|nohafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nohafathatha|nohafathatha]] || [[word:nohafajaja|nohafajaja]] || [[word:nohafashasha|nohafashasha]] || [[word:nohafakaka|nohafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nohafatha|nohafatha]] || [[word:nohafaja|nohafaja]] || [[word:nohafasha|nohafasha]] || [[word:nohafaka|nohafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nohafafthaf|nohafafthaf]] || [[word:nohafafjaf|nohafafjaf]] || [[word:nohafafshaf|nohafafshaf]] || [[word:nohafafkaf|nohafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nohafasha|nohafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nohafshÃḋasha|nohafshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nohafroasha|nohafroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nohafmuasha|nohafmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nohafyaasha|nohafyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonohafnkshÃḋasha|gonohafnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonohafnkroasha|gonohafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonohafnkmuasha|gonohafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonohafnkyaasha|gonohafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nohahafasha|nohahafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nohahafshÃḋasha|nohahafshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nohahafroasha|nohahafroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nohahafmuasha|nohahafmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nohahafyaasha|nohahafyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonohahafnkshÃḋasha|gonohahafnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonohahafnkroasha|gonohahafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonohahafnkmuasha|gonohahafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonohahafnkyaasha|gonohahafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nehÃḊfasha|nehÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nehÃḊfshÃḋasha|nehÃḊfshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nehÃḊfroasha|nehÃḊfroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nehÃḊfmuasha|nehÃḊfmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nehÃḊfyaasha|nehÃḊfyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonehÃḊfnkshÃḋasha|gonehÃḊfnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonehÃḊfnkroasha|gonehÃḊfnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonehÃḊfnkmuasha|gonehÃḊfnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonehÃḊfnkyaasha|gonehÃḊfnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nohfafasha|nohfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nohfafshÃḋasha|nohfafshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nohfafroasha|nohfafroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nohfafmuasha|nohfafmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nohfafyaasha|nohfafyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonohfafnkshÃḋasha|gonohfafnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonohfafnkroasha|gonohfafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonohfafnkmuasha|gonohfafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonohfafnkyaasha|gonohfafnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
